prompts.prompt:
Extract relevant investment information from the following data.
            
            Identify:
            - project name
            - location
            - asset type
            - acquisition price
            - deal structure
            - risks
            - financials
            - development plan

            THE VALUES AND RESPONSES MUST BE IN SPANISH EXCEPT NAMES BUT THE KEYS MUST BE IN ENGLISH.

            Schema:
            {schema}

            Source data:
            {source}
